full_text:
Qin Lang (Yuanming) 秦朗 (元明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qin Lang (秦朗), styledYuanming (元明). Led troops to pacify the Xianbei in 233. Close to Cao Rui. Qin Lang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
